sys_user_role.description: This is the admin role for the Document Approval App. An user with this role can create, read, write and delete in the tables document_approval and document_approval_category
sys_user_role.name: x_1871156_ngo_do_0.admin

sys_update_version.name: sys_user_role_10ba05c08232761096e933d04052738a
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_user_role"><sys_user_role action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><assignable_by/><can_delegate>true</can_delegate><description>This is the admin role for the Document Approval App. An user with this role can create, read, write and delete in the tables document_approval and document_approval_category</description><elevated_privilege>false</elevated_privilege><federated_id>Zd5+L+pT7xXp1Mynf+k40zJJBej0HKSe2F031PcGI6o=</federated_id><grantable>true</grantable><includes_roles/><name>x_1871156_ngo_do_0.admin</name><scoped_admin>false</scoped_admin><suffix>admin</suffix><sys_class_name>sys_user_role</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-01-27 15:20:24</sys_created_on><sys_id>10ba05c08232761096e933d04052738a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_1871156_ngo_do_0.admin</sys_name><sys_package display_value="NGO Donation & Distribution Management" source="x_1871156_ngo_do_0">40bac1c0d23276105c93871d08abce28</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="NGO Donation & Distribution Management">40bac1c0d23276105c93871d08abce28</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_user_role_10ba05c08232761096e933d04052738a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-27 15:20:24</sys_updated_on></sys_user_role></record_update>
